upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yadvE SItasya praSItaM tadDimasya jarAyu' (Sa॰brA॰9.1.2.26) praSabdaH prakarze SItamiti nizWAyAM samprasAraRe rUpam samprasAraRavirahe tu SyAnamASyAnaM saMSyAnamiti BavatyupasargAnvayavyatirekAByAm
'saritaH kurvatI gADAH paTaScASyAnakardamAn' (raGu0 424) ASyAno GanaBAvaM gataH kardamaH paNko yatra tAn
'sanDAraRaM mUtrapurIzayoSca sadyaH pratiSyAyanidAnamuktam' (suSruta0 uttara0 242) vAtaM prati aBimuKaM SyAyo gamanaM kaPAdInAM yatra sa pratiSyAya iti jahlaRaH pratiSInaH sABizyandaH sapravAhaH
